metadata.description: Deployment environment: dev | staging | prod
Parent DNS domain, e.g. rac.moffitt.org
Azure region for all resources
Entra tenant ID for OIDC issuer validation
Globally unique ACR name (3-50 alphanumeric, no hyphens)
Globally unique Storage account name (3-24 lowercase alphanumeric)
Globally unique Postgres server name (hyphens allowed)
Postgres admin password. MUST come from Key Vault reference in bicepparam; never inline.
App Gateway TLS certificate Key Vault secret ID (full versioned secret URI)
Control Plane managed identity principal ID (empty on first deploy; populated in Phase 5 Task 1 re-deploy)
VNet third octet (10/20/30 for dev/staging/prod)
Postgres sizing: SKU name
Postgres sizing: SKU tier
Postgres sizing: storage size in GB
Postgres sizing: HA mode (Disabled, SameZone, ZoneRedundant)
Postgres sizing: backup retention days

Postgres extensions to enable via azure.extensions. Defaults to [pg_uuidv7] but envs in regions where pg_uuidv7 is not on the allowlist (some demo subs, some regions) should override to [uuid-ossp]. See docs/runbooks/bootstrap.md section 8.
ACA environment: zone redundancy (dev: false, staging/prod: true)
ACA environment: workload profile SKU (Consumption or D4)
Alert action group — email recipients (comma-separated oncall addresses)
Alert action group — optional webhook URI (PagerDuty/ServiceNow). Leave empty to skip.
Shim ACA app resource ID for alerts (empty on first deploy; populate after Phase 6)
Control Plane ACA app resource ID for alerts (empty on first deploy; populate after Phase 2)
Pipeline timeout in minutes (used to compute stuck-pipeline alert threshold). Max 180 min due to Azure 360-min schema limit (2x multiplier for alert window).
Key Vault purge protection (false for dev, true for staging/prod)
Control Plane container image reference for scheduled jobs (e.g. acr.azurecr.io/rac-control-plane:latest). Leave empty to skip graph-sweep-job deployment.
Key Vault soft-delete retention in days (7 for dev, 90 for staging/prod)
Shim container image reference (e.g. racdevacr001.azurecr.io/rac-shim:v1.0). Leave empty on first deploy — shim ACA app is skipped until the image is pushed.
OIDC issuer URI for reviewer token validation (required when shimImageName is set)
Cookie domain for rac_session cookie (required when shimImageName is set, typically .{parentDomain})
Institution display name for shim branded pages
Optional institution brand logo URL for shim branded pages
Enable shim OpenTelemetry/Prometheus metrics
OTLP exporter endpoint for the shim (leave empty to disable OTLP export)
Deploy the control plane ACA app. Set true once a control-plane image has been pushed to ACR; false on first-deploy when the image is missing.
Entra app registration client ID for the control plane user-facing OIDC flow (required when deployControlPlaneApp=true).
Entra app registration client ID for the control plane API / client-credentials flow (required when deployControlPlaneApp=true).
Postgres login user the control plane authenticates as. Smoke-test default rac_admin uses the bootstrap admin password; a follow-up changes this to a least-privilege rac_app role.

Name of the Key Vault secret holding the Postgres password the control plane uses. Defaults to rac-pg-admin-password — operator must seed this in the platform KV (copy from bootstrap KV) before deploying with deployControlPlaneApp=true.
Institution display name for the control plane SPA / emails
Optional brand logo URL for the control plane SPA
Approver role (research/leadership stage)
Approver role (IT stage)
Scan severity gate threshold
GitHub owner of the rac-pipeline repo (empty until pipeline is wired)
GitHub repo name for the pipeline
Enable control-plane Prometheus/OpenTelemetry metrics endpoint
OTLP endpoint for the control plane (leave empty to disable)

Resource tags

Whether to attach the wildcard custom domain. Defaults to false because Front Door ManagedCertificate does not support wildcard hostnames, and CustomerCertificate setup requires KV access wired up via the FD profile MI. Set true after DNS delegation + a real cert + role assignments are in place (pass 2).

resources.name: [format('{0}/{1}/{2}', format('afd-rac-{0}', parameters('racEnv')), format('og-appgw-{0}', parameters('racEnv')), format('origin-appgw-{0}', parameters('racEnv')))]
[format('{0}/{1}/{2}', format('afd-rac-{0}', parameters('racEnv')), format('afd-endpoint-{0}', parameters('racEnv')), format('route-wildcard-{0}', parameters('racEnv')))]

properties.customDomains: [if(parameters('deployCustomDomain'), createArray(createObject('id', resourceId('Microsoft.Cdn/profiles/customDomains', format('afd-rac-{0}', parameters('racEnv')), format('domain-wildcard-{0}', parameters('racEnv'))))), createArray())]

dependsOn: [resourceId('Microsoft.Cdn/profiles/originGroups/origins', format('afd-rac-{0}', parameters('racEnv')), format('og-appgw-{0}', parameters('racEnv')), format('origin-appgw-{0}', parameters('racEnv')))]

Pipeline timeout in minutes (used for stuck-pipeline alert threshold). Max 180 min due to Azure 360-min schema limit (2x multiplier for alert window).

Deploy alerts that depend on telemetry tables/columns (ContainerAppConsoleLogs_CL.StatusCode_d, RAC_PipelineLog_CL). Azure validates KQL at create time, so these fail on a fresh workspace before the app has emitted any structured logs. Flip true once logs are flowing.
Resource tags applied to all resources

properties.description: Shim application 5xx error rate > 1% over 5 minutes

allOf.query:
ContainerAppConsoleLogs_CL
          | where ContainerAppName_s == "shim"
          | summarize total = count(), fivexx = countif(StatusCode_d >= 500) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1m)
          | extend rate = fivexx * 100.0 / total
          | where rate > 1.0 and total > 20

properties.description: Control Plane application 5xx error rate > 1% over 5 minutes

allOf.query:
ContainerAppConsoleLogs_CL
          | where ContainerAppName_s == "controlplane"
          | summarize total = count(), fivexx = countif(StatusCode_d >= 500) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1m)
          | extend rate = fivexx * 100.0 / total
          | where rate > 1.0 and total > 20

properties.description: Key Vault access denied errors > 0 over 5 minutes
Pipeline workflow stuck > 2x timeout without terminal verdict

allOf.query:
[format('let window_start = ago({0}m);
let started = RAC_PipelineLog_CL
| where TimeGenerated between (window_start .. now())
| where event_type_s == "pipeline_started"
| project correlation_id_s, started_at = TimeGenerated;
let verdicts = RAC_PipelineLog_CL
| where TimeGenerated between (window_start .. now())
| where event_type_s == "pipeline_verdict"
| project correlation_id_s;
started
| where correlation_id_s !in (verdicts)
| where started_at < ago({1}m)
| summarize stuck_count = count()', mul(2, parameters('pipelineTimeoutMinutes')), parameters('pipelineTimeoutMinutes'))]
